meta_title: First-Time Dog Owner Guide Singapore | Curious Tails
meta_description: Buying your first puppy in Singapore? The complete first-time owner checklist: choose the right breed, budget the first year, verify the seller, and survive week one.
h1: Your Complete Checklist: Buying Your First Puppy

entity_definitions.definition: Curious Tails is an AVS licensed pet shop in Balestier (AS24J00046) built around first-time owners: honest breed matching, a 30+ item starter kit, home setup, and a free training lesson.

First-time dog ownership in Singapore has five decisions in order: which breed fits your housing and routine, what the first year truly costs, whether the seller is AVS licensed, how to prepare the home, and how to run the first weeks. Get them in that order and the rest is joy, not crisis.

information_gaps_none_cover: seller verification as a first-timer step

lsi_keyword_weighting.instruction: Hub: capsules route to children; keep education summary-level.

content_outline.heading: Your Complete Checklist: Buying Your First Puppy
What should a first-time dog owner in Singapore do first?
Decision 1-5 stage cards
content_outline.cro_element: 5 routed stage blocks (breed → budget → verify → prepare → first weeks)
content_outline.first_party_prompt: Contrarian view: first-timers need a routine and someone to call, not more information.

faq.question: What should I do first when buying my first puppy?
faq.answer_direction: Fix housing + routine fit before anything: HDB status and alone-hours narrow the breed list fast; then budget, verify, prepare, and learn the first-week routine.

faq.question: Is the AVS Pet Ownership Course compulsory?
faq.answer_direction: Yes for first-time owners, before your first dog licence; free, online, one evening.

faq.question: How much should a first-timer budget?
faq.answer_direction: $2,888–$4,488 all-in at a licensed shop like ours, plus $1,200–$3,500 first-year running costs.

faq.question: Which breed is best for first-time owners?
faq.answer_direction: Cockapoo for families, Cavapoo for working couples; routine decides, and the quiz asks the right questions.

faq.question: What support exists after buying?
faq.answer_direction: Kit walkthrough, free training lesson, WhatsApp support, and the 5-day nurse-back safety net.

faq.question: What is the biggest first-timer mistake?
faq.answer_direction: Choosing by photo instead of routine; the breed-mismatch stories all start there.
